questionHtml:
The arrows represent electron flow in the diagram. What does terminal X on the battery represent?

A.  Anode and positive terminal

B.  Anode and negative terminal

C.  Cathode and positive terminal

D.  Cathode and negative terminal

meta.title: The arrows represent electron flow in the diagram. What does terminal X on the battery represent? A. Anode and positive terminal B. Anode and negative terminal C. Cathode and posit
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 3. What are the mechanisms of chemical change?

Reactivity 3.2.5—Oxidation occurs at the anode and reduction occurs at the cathode in electrochemical cells. Identify electrodes as anode and cathode, and identify their signs/polarities in voltaic cells and electrolytic cells, based on the type of reaction occurring at the electrode.
